content.doc: Walk walks up from cwd and returns every ancestor directory that contains a .leo/ subdirectory, ordered nearest-first. It stops at $HOME (exclusive) — it never walks above the user's home directory.  Symlinks are skipped: if a directory entry is a symlink, it is not followed. This prevents cycles and avoids traversing unexpected paths.
content.name: Walk
